content.en:
Whoa!!

Ye Tian came to the outside of the Xuanxu Ancient Realm.

At this time, the Wind Mountain Lord, the Dragon Shadow Palace Lord, the Thunder Tribulation Palace Lord, the Jinchen Dao Ancestor, and other half-step domain ancestors descended one by one.

Even the Ling Tian Dao Ancestor who was in seclusion behind the curtain also appeared, and the Ling Tian Dao Ancestor was also a Returning Realm Consummation Half-Step Domain Ancestor, who had been hidden and did not appear until the last Devouring Clan invasion.

Later, when the Battle Boundary Tower appeared, he naturally did not continue to hide, but took the initiative to appear, often entering and leaving the Battle Boundary Tower.

Now, with the invasion of the Devouring Clan, he naturally can't help but come.

"Ten Thousand Law Dao Ancestor, the Devouring Clan is menacing this time, I'm afraid I have full confidence!"

The Wind Mountain Lord frowned.

After all, the last time the Xuanxu to the Ancient Realm showed their strength, the Devouring Clan suffered heavy losses and fled, and now if they dare to come again, they must be sure of the other party, otherwise they will not come to die.

Even, Devouring Ancestor may have a domain ancestor coming this time.

It's not impossible!

"Don't worry!"

Ye Tian said lightly, his tone was full of confidence.

The Mountain Lord of Wind Mountain looked at Ye Tian in surprise, and couldn't help but be a little curious when he saw that Ye Tian was so confident.

He could see that Ye Tian's cultivation was still in the realm of all things, and although he had entered the first place in the Battle Realm Tower, his true strength had also exerted the combat power of the Sevenfold One Realm and a half-step domain ancestor at most.

And if he broke out with all his strength, this clone would be able to barely burst out with the Sevenfold One Realm Half-Step Domain Ancestor combat power.

But this kind of strength can't match a domain ancestor at all, even if the domain ancestor of the devouring clan is weak, it can still exert the combat power of the weaker eight-fold one-step domain ancestor of the half-step domain ancestor, right?

And he knew very well that Ye Tian's combat power could not last, so he couldn't compete with the Domain Ancestor!

Even if he and Ye Tian joined forces, they couldn't compete with a domain ancestor.

In such a situation, where did Ye Tian get his confidence.

Unless Ye Tian was sure that the Devouring Clan did not have a domain ancestor, but the Devouring Clan did not have a domain ancestor, how could he dare to kill it?

That's when it happened.

Rumble!!!!!

The Devouring Clan descended one by one, led by the Frost Heaven Emperor Ancestor.

The Frost Heaven Emperor Ancestor did not hide his aura at all, and the aura of the Domain Ancestor seemed to turn into an endless huge wave, rolling over.

"Domain Ancestor!"

The Wind Mountain Lord, the Dragon Shadow Palace Lord, the Thunder Tribulation Palace Lord, the Jinchen Dao Ancestor, and the Ling Tian Dao Ancestor all changed drastically in their expressions.

Their speculation became a reality, the Devouring Clan had really given birth to the Domain Ancestor, and it was also the Frost Heaven Emperor Ancestor, the Devouring Clan who had embarked on the path of cultivation.

Such a devouring clan, once they become a domain ancestor, their strength is even stronger than the other new domain ancestors of the devouring clan, and it is not much worse than the weaker new domain ancestors among the cultivators.

In terms of strength, the Frost Heaven Emperor Ancestor has the combat power of the Eightfold Return One Realm Half-Step Domain Ancestor to the Upper Eightfold Realm.

"Hahahaha, the cultivators of the Xuanxu to the Ancient Realm, are they very surprised and frightened to see me break through to the Domain Ancestor level?"

The Frost Heaven Saint Ancestor laughed.

He laughed, laughed wildly!

Last time, he returned in vain and was very angry.

Now, he wants to see who can stop him.

"I'll try to stop them as much as possible, and you will try to kill the other four Emperor Ancestors!"

The Mountain Lord of the Wind Mountain sighed.

In fact, he also knew that even if he really burned all the power of this clone, he would not be able to stop a domain ancestor, but if he didn't block it, everyone would die.

"I'll deal with the Frost Heaven Holy Ancestor!"

Ye Tian suddenly spoke.

"Ten Thousand Law Dao Ancestor, are you sure?"

The Mountain Lord of Wind Mountain was surprised.

Immediately, he said: "If you are not sure, you will flee into the Battle Realm Tower, no matter how powerful the Frost Heaven Saint Ancestor is, there is nothing they can do about the Battle Realm Tower, you can wait until you break through to the Unified Realm or the Domain Ancestor level, and then come out!"

In fact, he didn't want Ye Tian to fall.

"It's just a new domain ancestor!"

Ye Tian scorned.

Just then, the Devourer attacked.

The Frost Heaven Saint Ancestor made a direct move, and all the coercion at the Domain Ancestor level erupted.

Bang!!!!

A monstrous giant hand crushed it, causing many half-step domain ancestors to tremble, and those supreme Dao Ancestors and invincible Dao Ancestors seemed to have been frozen in their bodies, unable to move at all.

Then.

Ye Tian made a move.

"Broken!"

The Skykiller Spear stabbed through with a single blow.

At this time, Ye Tian only urged the Mixed Yuan Holy Body, although he had cultivated the Eternal Immortal Holy Body, he was still able to exert any of the three holy bodies.

With the blessing of the Mixed Yuan Holy Body, and then using a forbidden Dao technique like the Dark Extreme Dao Spear, it can also exert an attack power comparable to the top sevenfold return to one realm half-step domain ancestor level.

The Frost Heaven Saint Ancestor only attacked casually this time, that is, the attack power of the top sevenfold return to one realm half-step domain ancestor, so naturally he couldn't help Ye Tian.

A spear stabbed out, and the monstrous hand shattered.

"It's you!"

The Frost Heaven Holy Ancestor recognized Ye Tian.

Ye Tian was just an ant that day, if someone hadn't saved him, he would have killed Ye Tian a long time ago.

I didn't expect that Ye Tian would be able to block his move now, interesting!

"Then I'll kill you first!"

The Frost Heaven Holy Ancestor killed Ye Tian.

Ye Tian knew very well that if he didn't use the power of the Extreme Dao and the Holy Technique, he would still not be able to compete with the Frost Heaven Holy Ancestor.

Now, his extreme power is no longer a secret, and it is nothing to continue to wield it.

Rumble!!!!

With the blessing of the power of the Extreme Dao, Ye Tian's strength instantly increased to the top eightfold return to the first realm of the half-step domain ancestor combat power.

"Shadow Thorn!"

A spear pierced silently and instantly.

The Frost Heaven Holy Ancestor tried to fend off Ye Tian's attack, but the blow was too fast and ignored the distance, so he couldn't block it.

Poof!

The Sky Slaying Spear pierced through the Frost Heaven Holy Ancestor's body and injured him.

In the next combat power, Ye Tian completely crushed the Frost Heaven Saint Ancestor and easily suppressed him.

The Frost Heaven Saint Ancestor erupted with all his might, but he still couldn't defeat Ye Tian.

At this time.

The Mountain Lord of Fengshan and the others were stunned, and they were really shocked by Ye Tian's strength.

"This strength is comparable to the new Domain Ancestor!"

The Mountain Lord of Wind Mountain was surprised.

At this moment, he finally knew why Ye Tian was so calm, because his strength was already equivalent to that of a new domain ancestor, and it was not a problem to suppress the domain ancestor of the Devouring Clan.

"It's so wicked!"

The Wind Mountain Mountain Lord had never seen such a demonic Ten Thousand Realm Half-Step Domain Ancestor, even among the One-Step Domain Ancestors of the Divine Heaven Realm, there were very few people who could cross the level to challenge the Domain Ancestor, it was almost a Heavenly Barrier that was difficult to break!

But now, Ye Tian has done it!

"No way, how can you be stronger than me?"

The Frost Heaven Saint Ancestor didn't dare to believe it.

At this moment, another Ye Tian appeared.

This Ye Tian is Ye Tian's doppelganger, and now everyone knows that this is his doppelganger, and he doesn't bother to hide it.

As soon as the replica body appeared, it began to slaughter the Devourers.

The War Emperor Ancestor was targeted by Ye Tian's copy body, and wanted to escape, he had no secret treasure, where was Ye Tian's one-hit enemy, but he couldn't escape at all, and was pierced through his body by Ye Tian's spear, killing him instantly.

War Emperor, Fall!
